LanguageData.GuestBeds.helpText: Visitors prefer to sleep in beds.\n\nYou can convert beds to guest beds using the "For guests" button.
LanguageData.GuestBeds.label: guest beds
LanguageData.GuestWork.helpText: Happy guests will help with work inside of their area if they are skilled enough. You can disable this or raise the required skill in the mod options.
LanguageData.GuestWork.label: guests help out
LanguageData.RecruitGuest.helpText: You can recruit guests.\n\nRecruiting a guest will cost you goodwill with the guest's faction. Make sure you have a colonist with good social skills assigned for negotiation.
LanguageData.RecruitGuest.label: recruiting guests
